creator: torfinn.ingolfsen@broadpark.no
text:
Hello,

On Tue, 20 Oct 2009 20:07:19 +0200 (CEST)
dinoex@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: port graphics/tiff: tiff2pdf tints images with wrong colors
> when converting (any tiff version newer than 3.8.0)
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: suspended->feedback
> State-Changed-By: dinoex
> State-Changed-When: Tue Oct 20 20:06:24 CEST 2009
> State-Changed-Why: 
> 
> Please update to tiff 3.9.1 and test again.

Tested with tiff 3.9.2 from ports - the bug is still present. Updated
the page at 
http://sites.google.com/site/tingox/libtiff_freebsd
with new result images.
Test done with:
tingo@kg-v2$ uname -a
FreeBSD kg-v2.kg4.no 7.2-STABLE FreeBSD 7.2-STABLE #1: Fri Oct 30
19:46:58 CET 2009     root@kg-v2.kg4.no:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/V2  amd64

Hope this helps.
-- 
Regards,
Torfinn Ingolfsen
